requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109 Safety Evidence and Caribbean Environmental Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109安全证据及加勒比环境降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109安全證據及加勒比環境降額

summary.en: Solar PV inverters supplied to Grenada should be documented with IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 safety evidence for power converters used in photovoltaic systems. Because Grenada is a hurricane-exposed, humid, salt-mist coastal Caribbean market, project specifications may also require evidence for enclosure rating, corrosion resistance, thermal derating, surge protection, and installation conditions suitable for coastal service. Local acceptance should be coordinated with GDBS standards context, PURC-regulated project requirements, GRENLEC interconnection review, and the project owner or engineer.
summary.zh: 供应格林纳达的太阳能光伏逆变器应具备IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2光伏系统用功率变换器安全证据。由于格林纳达是受飓风影响、潮湿、沿海盐雾环境的加勒比市场，项目规格还可能要求提供适用于沿海服务的外壳防护等级、耐腐蚀、热降额、浪涌保护和安装条件证据。本地接受应结合GDBS标准背景、PURC监管项目要求、GRENLEC接入审查，以及项目业主或工程师意见协调。
summary.zht: 供應格瑞那達的太陽能光伏逆變器應具備IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2光伏系統用功率轉換器安全證據。由於格瑞那達是受颶風影響、潮濕、沿海鹽霧環境的加勒比市場，項目規格還可能要求提供適用於沿海服務的外殼防護等級、耐腐蝕、熱降額、浪湧保護和安裝條件證據。本地接受應結合GDBS標準背景、PURC監管項目要求、GRENLEC接入審查，以及項目業主或工程師意見協調。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Grenada Bureau of Standards (GDBS) — national standards body context
Public Utilities Regulatory Commission (PURC) — electricity-sector regulatory context
GRENLEC — utility interconnection review and project acceptance context

summary.en: China PV inverter safety files commonly rely on GB/T 37408-2021 or another current GB/T 37408 certificate package, NB/T 32004 technical documentation, factory quality records, and CNAS laboratory reports. These materials may demonstrate useful baseline design controls, but they are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for Grenada. China-side evidence also may not address tropical coastal derating, salt-mist exposure, hurricane wind-driven rain, surge environment, and installation requirements expected by Caribbean project owners.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全文件通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021或其他现行GB/T 37408证书包、NB/T 32004技术文件、工厂质量记录和CNAS实验室报告。上述材料可证明有用的基线设计控制，但不会自动等同于格林纳达所需IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。中国侧证据也可能未覆盖加勒比项目业主预期的热带沿海降额、盐雾暴露、飓风风雨、浪涌环境和安装要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全文件通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021或其他現行GB/T 37408證書包、NB/T 32004技術文件、工廠品質記錄和CNAS實驗室報告。上述材料可證明有用的基線設計控制，但不會自動等同於格瑞那達所需IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。中國側證據也可能未覆蓋加勒比項目業主預期的熱帶沿海降額、鹽霧暴露、颶風風雨、浪湧環境和安裝要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: A China GB/T inverter certificate does not by itself establish IEC 62109 safety compliance for Grenada. Exporters should compile IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates and reports for the model family, nameplate and installation instructions suitable for 230/400 V, 50 Hz service, and environmental evidence addressing corrosion, IP rating, surge protection, heat, humidity, and hurricane-exposed installations. Sea freight via St George's should preserve traceability of model numbers, ratings, manuals, and certificates in the import and project documentation package.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T逆变器证书本身不能证明符合格林纳达IEC 62109安全要求。出口商应汇编覆盖型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书和报告、适用于230/400 V、50 Hz服务的铭牌及安装说明，以及涉及腐蚀、IP等级、浪涌保护、高温、湿度和飓风暴露安装的环境证据。经圣乔治海运时，应在进口和项目文件包中保持型号、额定值、手册和证书的可追溯性。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T逆變器證書本身不能證明符合格瑞那達IEC 62109安全要求。出口商應彙編覆蓋型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書和報告、適用於230/400 V、50 Hz服務的銘牌及安裝說明，以及涉及腐蝕、IP等級、浪湧保護、高溫、濕度和颶風暴露安裝的環境證據。經聖喬治海運時，應在進口和項目文件包中保持型號、額定值、手冊和證書的可追溯性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where GDBS, PURC, GRENLEC, lender, project-owner, or engineer specifications require IEC safety evidence and environmental suitability for PV inverter acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 safety evidence supports China domestic files but is not automatically accepted as Grenada IEC 62109 or project environmental evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 safety documentation and Grenada-specific environmental derating evidence instead of relying on China GB/T 37408 files alone. The inverter package should address 230/400 V at 50 Hz service, hurricane exposure, humidity, salt-mist corrosion, surge protection, and St George's import traceability. Verify current GDBS, PURC, GRENLEC, and project-owner requirements before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应准备IEC 62109-1/-2安全文件和格林纳达特定环境降额证据，而不是仅依赖中国GB/T 37408文件。逆变器资料包应覆盖230/400 V、50 Hz服务、飓风暴露、湿度、盐雾腐蚀、浪涌保护和圣乔治进口可追溯性。出货或安装前请核实现行GDBS、PURC、GRENLEC及项目业主要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應準備IEC 62109-1/-2安全文件和格瑞那達特定環境降額證據，而不是僅依賴中國GB/T 37408文件。逆變器資料包應覆蓋230/400 V、50 Hz服務、颶風暴露、濕度、鹽霧腐蝕、浪湧保護和聖喬治進口可追溯性。出貨或安裝前請核實現行GDBS、PURC、GRENLEC及項目業主要求。
